publishedAbstract: Worker nodes enter DiskPressure: True and become unresponsive. Kubelet logs confirm the Hard Eviction Threshold for imagefs.available was triggered (threshold set at 15% or 0.15). The Garbage Collector (GC) fails with the specific error: ~~~ wanted to free 9223372036854775807 bytes, but freed 0 bytes space with errors in image deletion: [image is in use by a container] ~~~
publishedTitle: Kubelet ImageGCFailed "freed 0 bytes" deadlock during DiskPressure in OCP 4.x
